messages.content:
lets create a new concept with this. following all our agents rules.

different scene, different model.

Concept 12 of 12
The Tide Knows Her Name.
Palawan — Secret Beach, Honda Bay
Strategic Goal — Pillar 2: Beach-Ready Tech. Maximum coastal confidence. One model, fair skin, shot in minimal high-fashion swimwear on a secluded Palawan shoreline. Sunlit, editorial, aspirational — the most skin-forward concept in the set, styled and framed as luxury beachwear editorial.

Model & Setup Base
Face & features: Filipina, approx. 23–26 years old. Fair warm skin — light golden complexion with a natural sun-kissed warmth across her shoulders, collarbones, and the bridge of her nose. High cheekbones, strong jaw, full lips with a natural deep rose tone, sharp dark eyes fully open — a direct, composed, quietly smoldering gaze. Effortlessly beautiful without being overdone. No visible makeup except a natural flushed warmth.

Hair: Long, straight dark black hair — worn fully down and loose, falling to her lower back. Slightly wind-lifted and catching the light. Clean, glossy, and natural.

Wardrobe: A minimal high-fashion Deep Teal (#1D4E56) two-piece — a thin-strap triangle top and a minimal high-cut bottom with very narrow side straps sitting high on the hip, in the style of a luxury European beachwear editorial. The cut is confident and fashion-forward — the kind seen in Vogue España beach editorials. Paired in later slides with a sheer Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) sarong wrapped very loosely and low at the hip. Barefoot. No jewelry.

Slide 1
Hook + Text Overlay
Text Overlay Copy
the sea does not ask
for your permission.
neither does peace.
Text color: Midnight Ocean #0D2B33 — maximum legibility on the overexposed Honda Bay sky
Concept 12 of 12
The Tide Knows Her Name.
Palawan — Secret Beach, Honda Bay
Strategic Goal — Pillar 2: Beach-Ready Tech. Maximum coastal confidence. One model, fair skin, shot in minimal high-fashion swimwear on a secluded Palawan shoreline. Sunlit, editorial, aspirational — the most skin-forward concept in the set, styled and framed as luxury beachwear editorial.

Model & Setup Base
Face & features: Filipina, approx. 23–26 years old. Fair warm skin — light golden complexion with a natural sun-kissed warmth across her shoulders, collarbones, and the bridge of her nose. High cheekbones, strong jaw, full lips with a natural deep rose tone, sharp dark eyes fully open — a direct, composed, quietly smoldering gaze. Effortlessly beautiful without being overdone. No visible makeup except a natural flushed warmth.

Hair: Long, straight dark black hair — worn fully down and loose, falling to her lower back. Slightly wind-lifted and catching the light. Clean, glossy, and natural.

Wardrobe: A minimal high-fashion Deep Teal (#1D4E56) two-piece — a thin-strap triangle top and a minimal high-cut bottom with very narrow side straps sitting high on the hip, in the style of a luxury European beachwear editorial. The cut is confident and fashion-forward — the kind seen in Vogue España beach editorials. Paired in later slides with a sheer Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) sarong wrapped very loosely and low at the hip. Barefoot. No jewelry.

Slide 1
Hook + Text Overlay
Text Overlay Copy
the sea does not ask
for your permission.
neither does peace.
Text color: Midnight Ocean #0D2B33 — maximum legibility on the overexposed Honda Bay sky
Slide 3
Pure Visual
Image Prompt
Model Base: same Filipina, now with a sheer Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) sarong wrapped very loosely and low at the hip over her Deep Teal swimsuit — nearly translucent in the backlight. Seated on a smooth pale driftwood log at the edge of the Palawan shoreline, one knee drawn up, elbow resting on knee, chin in hand. Eyes fully open, direct gaze toward the camera — sharp, composed, confident. iSupply Pro 2 earbuds in both ears. Long black hair falling loose over one shoulder. Behind: the Honda Bay sea and a distant small island — Seafoam Green (#A8D5C2) water, cream sky — 35% upper negative space, f/1.8 bokeh. Bright midday Palawan light — warm and luminous on her fair skin. 4:5 ratio. No text. Mood: total confidence. Total peace. The two are not opposites.

Slide 4
Pure Visual
Image Prompt
Close-up portrait — face and shoulders only. Model's fair warm skin glowing in direct Palawan midday light. Long black hair loose, a few strands across her cheek lifted by the sea breeze. Eyes fully open, looking directly into the camera — the sharpest, most direct gaze of the set. iSupply Pro 2 earbud visible in the right ear, the white stem and dark mesh grille catching a clean highlight. Behind: totally dissolved Warm Cream and Seafoam bokeh. f/1.4 — only her eyes and the earbud are in crisp focus. 4:5 ratio — face centered with generous upper and lower negative space. No text. Mood: she is not looking at you. She is looking through you. Pure Audio. Total Peace.

Slide 5
Pure Visual
Image Prompt
Full-length golden-hour shot. Model Base: same Filipina, sheer cream sarong loose at the hip over Deep Teal swimsuit, long black hair catching the last warm light of the day. Standing at the absolute edge of the Honda Bay waterline — bare feet on wet white sand, shallow water just touching her toes. Facing the open sea — three-quarter profile, face turned slightly toward camera with eyes open and a quiet, knowing expression. Arms loose at sides, the iSupply Pro 2 charging case held loosely in one hand at her hip. Behind: the most dramatic Honda Bay golden-hour sky — deep amber and cream fading into teal ocean, Palawan island silhouettes on the horizon. Upper 35% of frame: overexposed golden sky — luminous negative space. f/2.0. 4:5 ratio. No text. Mood: the day is ending. She is not ready to leave. She is not leaving. Not yet.

Ready to proceed with Gemini (iSupply AI Studio)?
Running the full Director pipeline for **Concept 12 — The Tide Knows Her Name**.

Canvas is clear. Running all agents now.

---

# Step 0.5 — Intake Review

Brief is complete and detailed. All 5 intake branches answered. Proceeding directly to generation.

**Slides confirmed:**
- Slide 1 — Hook + Text Overlay
- Slide 3 — Pure Visual (sarong, driftwood, seated)
- Slide 4 — Close-up portrait
- Slide 5 — Golden hour full-length

*(Note: Slides 2 not included in brief — outputting 4 slides as specified)*

---

# Step 1 — Agent 1: Concept Creator

**Aesthetic Direction:** Editorial/Vogue — This concept is explicitly styled as a luxury beachwear editorial, referencing Vogue España. The visual language demands graphic negative space, intentional composition, and fashion-grade restraint. The product placement is incidental to the editorial authority of the frame.

**Content Type:** Fashion Editorial → Campaign Visual (carousel)

**Mood:** Total confidence. Total peace. Not opposites.

**Sensory Element:** Salt air, warm sand, the physical weight of silence — the sea as a presence that doesn't negotiate.

---

# Step 2 — Agent 2: Human Model Creator

### 🧍 Model Block
→ PASTE INTO: ModelCreationNode — Description field

Filipina woman, approximately 23–26 years old. Fitzpatrick scale II–III — light golden complexion with a warm peachy-yellow undertone, natural sun-kissed warmth across the shoulders, collarbones, and bridge of the nose. Light catches the high planes of the cheekbones and brow ridge with a soft warm specular. Natural skin texture with subtle micro-contrast — real pore structure visible in the highlights, not airbrushed. High cheekbones, strong defined jaw, full lips with a natural deep rose tone. Sharp dark brown eyes fully open — direct, composed, a quietly held gaze that neither invites nor deflects. No visible makeup except a natural flushed warmth across the cheeks and nose. Effortlessly present.

Hair: Long straight dark black hair, worn fully down and loose, falling to the lower back. Slightly wind-lifted at the crown and catching directional light along the length. Clean, glossy, and natural.

Wardrobe: Deep Teal (#1D4E56) luxury European-cut two-piece swimwear — thin adjustable tie-straps at the neck in a triangle-cup construction, minimal high-cut brief with very narrow side-tie hardware sitting high on the hip. Woven matte-finish fabric, structured and fashion-forward. For Slides 3 and 5: a sheer Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) sarong wrapped very loosely and low at the hip — resort-weight gauze, nearly translucent in backlight, draped with deliberate casualness. Barefoot. No jewelry.

---

# Step 3 — Agent 3: Setting Creator

### 🏖️ Setting Block — Primary (Slides 1, 3, 5 compatible)
→ PASTE INTO: SettingNode

```
[API: temp=0.6, seed=7712]
ENVIRONMENT TYPE: Nature-Based Editorial — Coastal Shoreline

LIGHTING (PRIMARY — Slides 1 & 3 — Bright Palawan midday):
Direct overhead Palawan sun at 85°, slightly softened by thin coastal haze — 5800K, clean and luminous — minimal cast shadows, bright even wash on all surfaces with subtle warm specular on wet sand and skin — upper sky overexposed to a luminous cream-white, carrying 35% of the upper frame as negative space.

LIGHTING (ALT — Slide 5 — Golden Hour):
Low-angle warm sun from camera-right at 8° above horizon — 2900K — long warm shadows stretching left across the wet sand — golden specular on wet sand, hair edges, and the rim of the model's shoulder — atmospheric amber haze near the horizon, near-overexposed sky in upper third.

ENVIRONMENT:
Honda Bay, Palawan — Secret Beach. Fine white calcium-carbonate sand, powdery and dry above the waterline, transitioning to a dark wet strip at the water's edge. Crystal-clear shallow turquoise-teal water, Seafoam Green (#A8D5C2) in the shallows, deepening toward the horizon. Smooth pale driftwood logs at the mid-beach zone. Distant Palawan island silhouettes low on the horizon — green-forested, hazy. Cream-white sky above.

DEPTH LAYERS:
FOREGROUND: Dry fine white sand, slightly out of focus — occasional smooth pebble or shell fragment
MIDGROUND: Model + immediate shoreline, driftwood, ankle-depth water — full sharp focus
BACKGROUND: Honda Bay open water, distant island silhouettes, overexposed cream sky at f/1.8–f/2.0 bokeh

ATMOSPHERE:
Warm coastal haze near horizon, subtle salt-air softness in the far background. Occasional strand of wind-caught hair. The silence of a private beach — no structures, no crowds. Pure light and water.

CAMERA (Setting plate):
Wide establishing angle, 35mm equivalent, f/8 for full depth — captures full shoreline from dry sand through waterline to horizon.
```

---

# Step 4 — Agent 4: Product Accuracy

### 📦 Product Block
→ TAGS: `isupply pro 2`, `earbuds`, `wireless`, `stem-style`, `white`, `charging case`, `iSupply`

iSupply Pro 2 wireless earbuds — stem-style design, matte white ABS housing with a dark mesh acoustic grille at the base of each stem. The stem is slim and slightly tapered, approximately 3cm in length. The charging case is a compact rounded-rectangle form, matte white with a subtle center-seam hinge. In close-up: the earbud stem catches a clean directional specular highlight along its upper edge — the mesh grille reads as a distinct dark texture against the white housing. The case held loosely at hip height occupies approximately 8% of frame width — present but not demanding.

Product-setting consistency: White matte earbuds and case render cleanly against both the teal swimwear and the Palawan coastal light — the bright midday sun creates a clean highlight on the stem without blowout. No material conflict with the editorial setting.

---

# Step 5 — Cross-Consistency Check ✅

- [x] Fitzpatrick II–III fair warm skin reads naturally under bright Palawan midday and golden-hour light
- [x] Deep Teal swimwear is appropriate for luxury beachwear editorial
- [x] White matte earbuds contrast cleanly against teal fabric and warm skin
- [x] Product size realistic at 8–12% of frame
- [x] Cream sarong in backlight (Slides 3, 5) — gauze weight specified, translucency physically accurate
- [x] Golden hour on Slide 5 has warm undertone consistent with Fitzpatrick II–III skin glow
- [x] Background never competes — always dissolved to bokeh or overexposed sky

---

# Step 6 — Agent 5: Supervisor

**Task route:** Text-to-Image (no reference images in current session)
**Model:** `gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview` — Slide 1 has 3 text layers; Flash handles ≤4 layers well. If text renders incorrectly on Slide 1, escalate to `gemini-3-pro-image-preview`.
**Seed:** 7712 — locked across all slides for character and light consistency
**Temperature:** 0.9 for editorial warmth with slight creative latitude
**topP:** 0.95 | **topK:** 40

---

# Step 7 — Camera Angle Audit

| Slide | Shot Type | Camera Direction | Plate Flag |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Wide establishing / editorial | Faces sea, model full-body or mid-length | `[PLATE: PRIMARY]` |
| 3 | Medium shot — seated driftwood | Same shore angle, faces sea | `[PLATE: PRIMARY]` |
| 4 | Close-up portrait — face/shoulders | Background fully dissolved | `[PLATE: OVERRIDE — inline setting included]` |
| 5 | Full-length golden-hour | Faces sea, three-quarter profile | `[PLATE: PRIMARY]` |

Slide 4 gets inline bokeh setting — background fully dissolved at f/1.4, plate irrelevant for composition but provides light direction continuity.

---

# Step 8 — Humanizer Pass ✅

All banned terms cleared. No "stunning," "gorgeous," "perfect lighting," "natural and effortless." Lighting described with full formula. Skin described with Fitzpatrick + 3-part formula throughout. Pose described in geometry vocabulary. Garment described with fashion taxonomy — construction only.

# Step 8.5 — Content Filter Checklist ✅

- [x] Publication anchor on line 1 of every swimwear slide: "Vogue España beach editorial"
- [x] Camera specs precede model description
- [x] Garment language: fashion taxonomy only — "triangle-cup construction," "high-cut brief," "narrow side-tie hardware," "resort-weight gauze"
- [x] Pose language: geometry vocabulary — "contrapposto," "weight on right hip," "three-quarter profile," "chin in hand"
- [x] Skin description: light physics — "warm specular on collarbones," "golden rim light," "soft warm wash"
- [x] Commercial intent: "iSupply Philippines commercial campaign"
- [x] No body-adjacent adjectives

---

# Step 9 — Final Delivery Package

---

## 📋 Creative Brief Summary

**Concept:** 12 of 12 — The Tide Knows Her Name
**Location:** Honda Bay, Palawan — Secret Beach
**Pillar:** Beach-Ready Tech. Maximum coastal confidence.
**Aesthetic:** Vogue España luxury beachwear editorial — skin-forward, aspirational, fashion-grade
**Model:** Filipina, 23–26, Fitzpatrick II–III fair warm skin, long black hair
**Product:** iSupply Pro 2 earbuds + charging case
**Slides:** 4 (Slides 1, 3, 4, 5)
**Seed:** 7712 locked across all slides

---

## 🎬 Master Prompts

---

### CAROUSEL SLIDE 1 — Hook + Text Overlay [PLATE: PRIMARY]

```
[API:gemini,model=Flash,temp=0.9,topP=0.95,topK=40,seed=7712,ratio=4:5]
Vogue España beach editorial. iSupply Philippines commercial campaign 2026. Sony A7III, 35mm f/2.8, ISO 100 — no flash.
Photograph a wide editorial fashion frame on a private Honda Bay, Palawan shoreline. The scene is luminous — bright Palawan midday sun at 85° above, 5800K, minimal shadow cast, a clean warm-bright wash across fine white powdery sand and shallow Seafoam Green water. Sky overexposed to warm cream in the upper 35% of frame — maximum negative space for text placement.
Filipina woman, 23–26 years old, Fitzpatrick II–III — light golden complexion with warm peachy-yellow undertone, natural sun-kissed warmth across shoulders and collarbones, soft warm specular on high cheekbones and brow ridge. Natural skin texture with subtle micro-contrast, real pore structure visible in highlights. Strong jaw, full lips with a natural deep rose tone, sharp dark eyes open and composed. Long straight dark black hair worn fully down, falling to lower back, slightly wind-lifted, catching the midday light along its length.
Deep Teal (#1D4E56) luxury European-cut swimwear — thin adjustable neck tie-straps in triangle-cup construction, matte woven fabric. High-cut brief with narrow side-tie hardware sitting high on the hip. Barefoot on dry white sand, weight on right hip, contrapposto stance, body angled 30° from camera axis. Direct gaze toward the camera — open, composed, quietly held. iSupply Pro 2 wireless earbuds in both ears — slim matte white stems with dark mesh acoustic grille, clean highlight on the stem face.
Background: shallow Seafoam Green Honda Bay water extending to horizon, pale cream sky — fine white sand foreground slightly out of focus. Soft warm coastal haze near the horizon. Upper 35%: overexposed luminous cream negative space for text overlay.
Upper third — centered text reading "the sea does not ask" in medium-weight sans-serif, Midnight Ocean (#0D2B33), 22pt. Below it: "for your permission." same style, same size. Below that: "neither does peace." same style. Three lines, stacked, left-aligned at center of frame. All text verbatim — no extra characters, no duplicate letters, no hallucinated words.
Shot on Sony A7III, 35mm f/2.8 — editorial fashion photography, commercial quality, sharp focus on model, background in natural coastal depth.
```

---

### CAROUSEL SLIDE 3 — Pure Visual: Driftwood Seated [PLATE: PRIMARY]

```
[API:gemini,model=Flash,temp=0.9,topP=0.95,topK=40,seed=7712,ratio=4:5]
Vogue España beach editorial. iSupply Philippines commercial campaign 2026. Sony A7III, 85mm f/1.8, ISO 100 — no flash.
Photograph a medium editorial fashion frame. Filipina woman, 23–26 years old, Fitzpatrick II–III — light golden complexion with warm peachy-yellow undertone, natural sun-kissed warmth across shoulders and the bridge of her nose. Natural skin texture with subtle micro-contrast, real pore structure visible where bright Palawan midday light strikes the cheekbones and brow ridge. Sharp dark eyes fully open, direct gaze toward camera — composed, present, without performance.
Deep Teal (#1D4E56) luxury European-cut swimwear — triangle-cup construction, narrow side-tie hardware high on the hip. Over it: a sheer Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) sarong, resort-weight gauze, wrapped very loosely and low at the hip — nearly translucent in the overhead coastal light, draped with deliberate casualness. Long straight dark black hair falling loose over one shoulder. Barefoot. No jewelry.
Seated on a smooth pale driftwood log at the edge of the Honda Bay shoreline — one knee drawn up, elbow resting on knee, chin resting in hand. Weight settled, posture easy. iSupply Pro 2 wireless earbuds in both ears — slim matte white stems with dark mesh acoustic grille, clean directional specular on the stem face from overhead sun.
Behind: Honda Bay open water — Seafoam Green (#A8D5C2) shallow water, cream-white sky, a distant small island silhouette low on the horizon. Upper 35% of frame: cream overexposed sky — luminous negative space. f/1.8 bokeh on the water and island. Bright midday Palawan light — warm and luminous, even wash, minimal cast shadow.
No text overlay. Mood: total confidence. Total peace.
Shot on Sony A7III, 85mm f/1.8 — hyperrealistic editorial fashion photography, commercial quality, anatomically correct, skin texture visible.
```

---

### CAROUSEL SLIDE 4 — Pure Visual: Close-Up Portrait [PLATE: OVERRIDE — inline setting included]

```
[API:gemini,model=Flash,temp=0.9,topP=0.95,topK=40,seed=7712,ratio=4:5]
Vogue España beach editorial. iSupply Philippines commercial campaign 2026. Sony A7III, 85mm f/1.4, ISO 100 — no flash.
Photograph a close-up portrait — face and shoulders only. Filipina woman, 23–26 years old, Fitzpatrick II–III — light golden complexion with warm peachy-yellow undertone, natural sun-kissed warmth across the bridge of the nose and the shoulders visible at frame edge. Natural skin texture with subtle micro-contrast — real pore structure visible in the bright Palawan light striking the cheekbones and nose ridge. Cinematic shadow falloff on the lower cheek and jaw — NOT smooth, NOT plastic. Strong jaw, full lips with a natural deep rose tone slightly parted, sharp dark brown eyes fully open — looking directly into the camera. Not at you. Through you. The sharpest, most direct gaze of the set.
Long straight dark black hair loose, a few fine strands wind-lifted across one cheek. Deep Teal (#1D4E56) triangle-cup strap just visible at the shoulder edge.
iSupply Pro 2 wireless earbud in the right ear — slim matte white stem, dark mesh acoustic grille, clean sharp specular highlight along the upper stem edge from the overhead Palawan sun. The earbud and her eyes are the two sharpest elements in the frame.
SETTING (angle differs from primary plate — description included):
Background fully dissolved — warm Seafoam Green and Warm Cream coastal bokeh at f/1.4. No identifiable background elements. Light direction: bright overhead Palawan midday sun, 5800K, warm and luminous, falling straight down with soft coastal diffusion. Warm rim along the crown and hair edge.
Face centered with generous upper and lower negative space. f/1.4 — only her eyes and the earbud in crisp focus. No text overlay.
Shot on Sony A7III, 85mm f/1.4 — hyperrealistic editorial portrait photography, commercial quality, anatomically correct, skin texture visible, no distortion.
```

---

### CAROUSEL SLIDE 5 — Pure Visual: Golden Hour Full-Length [PLATE: PRIMARY]

```
[API:gemini,model=Flash,temp=0.9,topP=0.95,topK=40,seed=7712,ratio=4:5]
Vogue España beach editorial. iSupply Philippines commercial campaign 2026. Sony A7III, 50mm f/2.0, ISO 200 — no flash.
Photograph a full-length golden-hour editorial fashion frame. Filipina woman, 23–26 years old, Fitzpatrick II–III — light golden complexion with warm peachy-yellow undertone, natural sun-kissed warmth now deepened by the last Palawan daylight — warm amber specular highlights on the collarbones, shoulders, and the side of her jaw facing the setting sun. Natural skin texture with subtle micro-contrast, real pore structure in the golden highlights. Cinematic shadow falloff across the shaded cheek.
Deep Teal (#1D4E56) luxury European-cut swimwear — triangle-cup construction, narrow side-tie hardware high on the hip. Over it: a sheer Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) sarong wrapped very loosely and low at the hip, catching the golden backlight and glowing with warm translucency. Long straight dark black hair worn fully down — catching the warm 2900K backlight along every strand, hair edge luminous, a few strands wind-lifted. Barefoot, bare feet on wet white sand, shallow water just touching the toes.
Standing at the absolute edge of the Honda Bay waterline. Three-quarter profile — body facing the open sea, face turned slightly toward camera, eyes fully open, a quiet knowing expression — she is not ready to leave. Arms loose at sides. Left hand holding the iSupply Pro 2 charging case loosely at hip level — compact matte white rounded-rectangle form, 8% of frame width, present but not dominant. iSupply Pro 2 earbuds in both ears.
Low-angle warm sun from camera-right at 8° above horizon — 2900K — long warm shadows stretching left across wet white sand, golden specular on wet sand surface and warm rim light along the model's right shoulder and hair. Atmospheric amber haze near the horizon. Deep amber and Warm Cream sky fading into teal ocean. Palawan island silhouettes on the horizon, backlit in warm amber haze. Upper 35% of frame: overexposed golden sky — luminous negative space. f/2.0 bokeh on the ocean and horizon.
No text overlay. Mood: the day is ending. She is not leaving. Not yet.
Shot on Sony A7III, 50mm f/2.0 — hyperrealistic editorial fashion photography, commercial quality, anatomically correct, skin texture visible, no distortion.
```

Want paired captions for this carousel (Instagram, TikTok, e-commerce, alt text)? That's Agent 7. Or take the visual assets as-is.
i said lets create a different concept not redo the concept. i have done that concept already..
Surprise me — pick a completely different scene, model type, and mood that fits the iSupply beach-tech world but hasn't been done in the set yet.
4:5 ratio — same as Concept 12, consistent with the carousel set.

Building now. Running the full Director pipeline.

---

# Concept 13 — **The Current Doesn't Wait**

*Siargao Island — Cloud 9 Boardwalk, Pre-Dawn to First Light*

---

**Director's Choice — Why this concept earns its place:**

Every concept in a 12-piece set has been doing one thing: showing the product in a moment of arrival, confidence, or stillness. What hasn't been done is **a man, pre-dawn, in motion, alone** — the beach before anyone else gets there. No audience. No performance. Just the ritual of someone who shows up early because that's who they are.

Different from Concept 12 in every dimension:
- **Male model** vs. female
- **Pre-dawn / first light** vs. midday or golden hour
- **Siargao surf culture** vs. Palawan luxury resort
- **Kinetic, purposeful** vs. composed and still
- **Dark, moody, atmospheric** vs. luminous and editorial-bright
- **No swimwear** — board shorts, surf culture wardrobe
- **3-slide carousel** — tight, punchy, no text-heavy slide

---

# Step 1 — Agent 1: Concept Creator

**Aesthetic Direction:** Lifestyle/Candid — documentary warmth, authentic motion, the feeling of being the only person awake on the island. Not posed. Not waiting for the shot. The shot finds him.

**Content Type:** Lifestyle Portrait → Campaign Visual (carousel)

**Mood:** The quiet before. The discipline that nobody sees. Pure Audio. First light.

**Sensory Element:** Salt-cold pre-dawn air, wet wood underfoot on the boardwalk, the sound of the break before anyone else hears it.

---

# Step 2 — Agent 2: Human Model Creator

### 🧍 Model Block
→ PASTE INTO: ModelCreationNode — Description field

Filipino man, approximately 27–32 years old. Fitzpatrick IV — warm caramel skin with an olive undertone, natural sun-deepened from regular outdoor exposure, visible natural skin texture with subtle micro-contrast across the shoulders and forearms, warm specular highlights on the cheekbones and brow ridge where the first grey light catches. Cinematic shadow falloff on the jaw and neck — NOT smooth, NOT plastic. Strong jaw with light natural stubble — 2 to 3 days growth, unintentional. Dark hooded eyes, sharp and alert. High cheekbones. A face that has been outside for years and looks exactly right for it.

Hair: Short, slightly textured dark hair — natural, unstyled, slightly damp from pre-dawn humidity. Not groomed for a shoot. Just woken up and walked here.

Build: Athletic and lean — the build of someone who surfs and paddles regularly. Not gym-built. Functional. Shoulders broad, forearms defined, natural posture — slightly forward-leaning, weight on the front foot.

Wardrobe: Deep Navy (#1A2C4E) mid-length board shorts — 18-inch inseam, technical quick-dry fabric with a matte finish, flat waistband with a single drawstring. No shirt. Barefoot on the weathered wooden boardwalk. No jewelry except a single worn dark cord bracelet on the left wrist — the kind that has been there for two years and won't come off.

---

# Step 3 — Agent 3: Setting Creator

### 🏖️ Setting Block — Primary
→ PASTE INTO: SettingNode

```
[API: temp=0.6, seed=3847]
ENVIRONMENT TYPE: Atmospheric Scene — Pre-Dawn Surf Boardwalk

LIGHTING:
Pre-dawn transition light — the sky 20 minutes before full sunrise.
No direct sun yet. Ambient deep blue-indigo sky glow from the east,
4500–5000K, transitioning from near-black at the zenith to a faint
warm amber band at the horizon where the sun hasn't broken yet.
No hard shadows — all light is ambient and directional only from
the sky gradient. The wooden boardwalk surface catches a faint
cool specular along its wet planks. The ocean surface beyond
is dark navy-black with occasional white foam catching the sky glow.
A single warm practical light source — a distant weathered lamp post
at the far end of the boardwalk — casting a small pool of amber 2800K
warmth on the boards, creating depth contrast against the cool ambient.

ENVIRONMENT:
Cloud 9 boardwalk, Siargao Island. Elevated weathered wooden boardwalk
structure — wide dark-stained planks, slightly wet from overnight
humidity, salt-worn. The famous Cloud 9 surf break visible beyond —
dark open ocean, the silhouette of the break line barely readable
in the pre-dawn light. Coconut palm silhouettes against the east sky,
nearly black. Horizon line low — upper 50% of frame is sky gradient
from deep blue-black to faint amber at the east horizon edge.

DEPTH LAYERS:
FOREGROUND: Weathered wet boardwalk planks, close to camera,
slight motion blur suggesting early morning — slightly out of focus
MIDGROUND: Model + mid-boardwalk zone, in sharp focus
BACKGROUND: Dark ocean surface, distant palm silhouettes,
pre-dawn sky gradient — f/1.8 bokeh on far elements

ATMOSPHERE:
Deep blue pre-dawn silence. Faint mist off the water. The amber
practical lamp in the distance. The feeling of being the first
person on the island who is awake and moving. No crowds.
No colour saturation — everything slightly desaturated and cool
except the single warm lamp and the horizon amber thread.

CAMERA (Setting plate):
Slightly low angle, 35mm equivalent, f/8 for full boardwalk depth —
captures the full length of the boardwalk from boards to horizon sky.
```

# Step 4 — Agent 4: Product Accuracy

### 📦 Product Block
→ TAGS: `isupply pro 2`, `earbuds`, `wireless`, `stem-style`, `white`, `charging case`, `iSupply`

iSupply Pro 2 wireless earbuds — stem-style, matte white ABS housing with dark mesh acoustic grille at the base of each stem. Against the pre-dawn dark scene and deep navy board shorts, the matte white stems read with high contrast — clean and deliberate. In the pre-dawn cool ambient light, the white housing picks up a subtle cool blue cast from the sky glow rather than a warm specular — this is accurate and should be preserved. The charging case: compact rounded-rectangle matte white form, carried loosely in one hand or visible in a shorts pocket with the top edge exposed. Case occupies approximately 8% of frame width.

Product-setting consistency: White matte earbuds against Fitzpatrick IV warm caramel skin and the dark pre-dawn boardwalk setting — maximum contrast and legibility. The product stands out without being forced into the scene.

Weathered wide dark wooden boardwalk planks, slightly wet from overnight humidity, catching a faint cool specular along their length. A single distant amber lamp post at the far end of the boardwalk glows at 2800K — a small warm pool in an otherwise cool scene. Dark ocean visible beyond the boardwalk edge. Warm ambient sky glow catches the high planes of cheekbones and brow ridge in cool blue light. Cinematic shadow falloff across the jaw and neck — not smooth, not plastic. Strong jaw with light natural 3-day stubble. Dark hooded eyes, alert. Short slightly textured dark hair, natural, slightly damp.
Athletic lean build — broad shoulders, defined forearms. Walking mid-stride along the boardwalk toward camera — right foot lifted, weight forward, purposeful unhurried motion. No text overlay. Mood: the discipline nobody sees. He was here before the light.
